a_image.alt: Afrofuturism style mood board — Subculture · Future Heritage

sections.a_eyebrow: Futuristic · Bold Colors · Vibrant · Cultural · Expressive
sections.a_description: Ancient gold and cosmic indigo, heritage patterns and futuristic geometry, and the powerful vision of African cultures projected into tomorrow — Afrofuturism design creates the visual language of futures rooted in deep cultural memory. The rich gold accents against cosmic dark backgrounds evoke both ancient kingdoms and advanced civilizations, while bold geometric typography channels the energy of a movement that reimagines history and future simultaneously.

This visionary style powers Black cultural institutions, Afrofuturist art galleries, heritage-forward fashion brands, and sci-fi community platforms. You'll see it on museum exhibition sites, Black-owned tech startup pages, diaspora cultural platforms, and creative projects inspired by the works of Octavia Butler, Sun Ra, and the visual world of Black Panther — where the future is built on the foundation of ancestral wisdom.

The powerful, heritage-future aesthetic of Afrofuturism — ancient patterns reimagined through futuristic lenses, bold color palettes, and the visionary intersection of African heritage and science fiction. Background: deep indigo-black (#0a0a1e) — the cosmic void from which futures emerge. The .inner panel has a dark background (#12122e) with a 2px left border in bright gold (#ffd700) and 8px border-radius — geometric precision with royal accents. Colors: rich gold (#ffd700) as the primary accent — the gold of ancient kingdoms and future civilizations. Bright violet (#9b59b6) as secondary. Off-white (#f0ece0) for headings, muted lavender (#a0a0c8) for body text. The aesthetic is regal and futuristic — Wakanda's design language, where advanced technology coexists with deep cultural roots. Set in Syne — a bold geometric typeface with Afrofuturist energy, designed at the Atelier National de Recherche Typographique in France. Heading at weight 700, 28px, line-height 1.2, color #f0ece0. Eyebrow at weight 500, 11px, uppercase, 3px letter-spacing, color #ffd700. Body at weight 400, 15px, line-height 1.7, color #a0a0c8. Buttons: primary — gold (#ffd700), dark text (#0a0a1e), 4px border-radius. Secondary: transparent, violet border (#9b59b6). Alternatives: Outfit (modern geometric), Space Grotesk (futuristic).
{What this palette represents — the core identity}
